features: Adults and children over 2 years: brush teeth thoroughly, preferably after each meal or at least twice a day or according to the instructions of a dentist or doctor.
Children from 2 to 6 years: use only a pea-sized amount and supervise the child's brushing and rinsing (to minimise swallowing).
Children under 2 years: consult a dentist or a doctor.
description: Product description The triple feel of Colgate Triple Original Mint Action toothpaste will make you smile all day long. It contains fluoride to protect against tooth decay, helps remove surface stains for whiter teeth and has a great mint flavour for fresh breath. Protects against tooth decay, helps whiten teeth, refreshes breath toothpaste, whitening, whiter teeth, teeth whitening, fresh breath Directions 1. Adults and children over 2 years: brush teeth thoroughly, preferably after each meal or at least twice a day or according to the instructions of a dentist or doctor. 2. Children from 2 to 6 years: use only a pea-sized amount and supervise the child's brushing and rinsing (to minimise swallowing). 3. Children under 2 years: consult a dentist or a doctor. Safety Warning Contains fluoride. Children under 2 should consult a dentist or doctor before use. See more
